# /plan

> L1-L4 work breakdown grouped by reporting artefact layer (dataflow / dataset / report / dashboard / app / security).

## Usage

```
/plan [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Hierarchy

- **L1 Epic** — the reporting feature
- **L2 Capability** — per layer:
  - `dataflow` — Power BI dataflows (Gen1/Gen2)
  - `dataset` — semantic model
  - `report` — Power BI reports + CE SSRS
  - `dashboard` — Power BI dashboards (pinned visuals)
  - `app` — Power BI app publishing
  - `security` — RLS / OLS / sensitivity / sharing
  - `data-sourcing` — Synapse Link / BYOD / gateway / connection setup
- **L3 User Story** — one per FR
- **L4 Task** — 3-8h atom per artefact

## Execution flow

1. Generate L1 from spec §1.
2. Generate L2 by walking spec §5 (reporting layer).
3. Generate L3 per FR.
4. Generate L4 placeholders per layered artefact.
5. `<TBD>` markers where input incomplete; `/clarify` resolves.
6. `currentStates += PLAN_DRAFT`; `gate PLAN_CLARIFIED.status=PENDING`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/reporting/features/{f}/plan.md`
